name: Fast Castle
description: Rush to Castle Age with ~21 villagers, skipping military investment in Feudal Age.

steps.label: 6 Sheep
steps.description: Send your 3 starting villagers to the 6 sheep near your Town Center.
steps.notes: Keep sheep under the Town Center to avoid scout attacks.

steps.label: 3 Wood
steps.description: Queue 3 more villagers and send the next 3 to the nearest wood line.
steps.notes: Lure the boar as soon as you have 8 villagers.

steps.label: 1 Boar
steps.description: Lure the first boar with a villager and task 3–4 villagers on it.
steps.notes: Pull 1 sheep villager onto the boar to speed up food collection.

steps.label: Build Barracks & 2nd Boar
steps.description: Build a Barracks with a wood villager, then lure the 2nd boar.
steps.notes: The Barracks is required to advance to Feudal Age.

steps.label: Advance to Feudal Age
steps.description: With 14–15 villagers, click Feudal Age and task 2 villagers to build a Lumber Camp.

steps.label: Build Blacksmith & Market
steps.description: In Feudal Age, build a Blacksmith and Market to unlock Castle Age.
steps.notes: Castle Age costs 800 food and 200 gold.

steps.label: Advance to Castle Age
steps.notes: You have reached the Fast Castle! Build a Castle or boom from here.
